SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.serializer

Interface Serializer

All Known Implementing Classes:
EncryptingSerializer, JsonSerializer
public interface Serializer
Strategy for serializing and deserializing business payloads to and from a storable string representation (e.g. JSON), and for resolving a payload's runtime Class.

All methods accept null and return null when input is null, so callers do not need null-guards around every invocation.

Author:
Anand Manissery
See Also:
  • JsonSerializer

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> @Nullable T
    deserialize(@Nullable String payload, Class<T> clazz)
    Deserializes payload back to an instance of clazz.
    <T> @Nullable String
    serialize(@Nullable T payload)
    Serializes payload to its string representation.
    <T> @Nullable Class<T>
    toClass(@Nullable String className)
    Resolves a Class from its fully-qualified name.
    <T> @Nullable String
    toClassName(@Nullable T payload)
    Returns the fully-qualified class name of payload's runtime type.

  • Method Details

    • serialize

      <T> @Nullable String serialize(@Nullable T payload)
      Serializes payload to its string representation.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object to serialize; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the serialized string, or null if payload is null

    • deserialize

      <T> @Nullable T deserialize(@Nullable String payload, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes payload back to an instance of clazz.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      payload - the serialized string; null is allowed
      clazz - the target class; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the deserialized object, or null if either argument is null

    • toClassName

      <T> @Nullable String toClassName(@Nullable T payload)
      Returns the fully-qualified class name of payload's runtime type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object whose class name is needed; null is allowed
      Returns:
      payload.getClass().getName(), or null if payload is null

    • toClass

      <T> @Nullable Class<T> toClass(@Nullable String className)
      Resolves a Class from its fully-qualified name.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the expected type
      Parameters:
      className - the fully-qualified class name; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the resolved Class, or null if className is null
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - wrapping ClassNotFoundException if the class cannot be found
